.fMUfmc footer{background-color:var(--colour-background-headerDarkBlueToSecondary);border-top:2px solid #75a535;padding:24px;}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc hr{border-color:white!important;}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .info-and-utilities-nav{margin:0;list-style:none;}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .info-and-utilities-nav li{padding-bottom:0;background-color:var(--colour-background-noneToSecondary);}/*!sc*/
@media only screen and (max-width:768px){.fMUfmc .info-and-utilities-nav{padding-inline:0!important;}}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .footer-links{color:var(--colour-text-whiteToLink);line-height:2;text-decoration-thickness:1px;}/*!sc*/
@media only screen and (max-width: 480px){.fMUfmc .footer-links{display:block;line-height:1;font-size:1.125rem;min-height:48px;}}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .footer-links img{width:140px;}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .footer-home-link{padding:0;display:block;outline:1px solid var(--colour-background-noneOnlyContrast);}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .footer-home-link.tts-highlight img{outline:3px dashed var(--colour-text-ttsOutline);outline-offset:1px;z-index:1;}/*!sc*/

.fMUfmc .footer-divider{background-color:white;width:50%;}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .sm-container{justify-content:center;}/*!sc*/
.fMUfmc .social-container{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:30px;margin-inline:auto;list-style:none;margin-bottom:0;}/*!sc*/
